name: Penne Alla Malefemmina
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Basil leaves, some whole, some chopped in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the sauce by combining olive oil with olives, capers, garlic, tomatoes, basil, salt, and red pepper flakes.
2. Let the mixture marinate for at least 30 minutes if possible.
3. Cook the macaroni pasta in rapidly boiling salted water until al dente.
4. Drain the pasta and toss it with the sauce.
5. Serve immediately or let cool and enjoy as a salad.
